seo.metaTitle: White-Label SSL Certificates for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Add trusted SSL certificates to your digital portfolio. Hostopia's white-label SSL platform lets you secure SMB websites, support PCI compliance, and grow recurring revenue.

hero.headline: Website Security That Sells Itself — Under Your Brand
hero.subheadline: Every SMB website that collects data or takes payments needs encryption. Most owners don't know which SSL they need or how to install it.
hero.description: Hostopia's white-label SSL Certificates let you offer trusted encryption, visible trust signals, and PCI compliance support — directly from your brand. The highest-attach add-on in your portfolio.

items.title: Data protection
items.body: 128-bit encryption protects sensitive information — logins, payments, personal data — in transit between browser and server.

image.alt: Secure encrypted data and website protection

items.title: Visible trust signals
items.body: Browser padlock, site seals, and (for EV) green address bar that visitors can click to verify security.

image.alt: Browser security padlock and trust indicators

items.title: PCI compliance support
items.body: Meet basic security requirements for accepting credit cards and complying with PCI standards.

items.title: Better search rankings
items.body: Encrypted sites benefit from improved visibility on major search engines.

heroImage.alt: SSL certificate and website security concept

features.heading: SSL for Every SMB Scenario — One Platform
features.intro: From basic blogs to high-volume ecommerce, Hostopia's SSL portfolio covers the full range of SMB security needs.

cards.title: Domain Validation (DV SSL)
cards.body: Entry-level encryption with domain validation and static site seal. Ideal for blogs, informational sites, and businesses just getting started online.

cards.title: Organization Validation (OV SSL)
cards.body: Company-validated encryption with dynamic site seal and higher warranty. Recommended for commercial and public-facing business sites.

cards.title: Extended Validation (EV SSL)
cards.body: Highest level of validation with company verification, green address bar, and premium warranty. Built for ecommerce and login-heavy sites.

cards.title: Wildcard SSL
cards.body: Secures a domain and all subdomains (store.example.com, mail.example.com) with one certificate — reducing complexity and cost for growing businesses.

partnerAdvantage.heading: The Highest-Attach Add-On in Your Portfolio
partnerAdvantage.intro: SSL is essential, low-friction, and bundles with everything. Every website, every store, every hosting plan is an SSL opportunity.

items.title: Bundle with everything
items.body: SSL pairs naturally with websites, ecommerce, hosting, and email. Bundle it into your core plans or sell it as a standalone security add-on.

items.title: Drive recurring revenue
items.body: Annual certificate renewals create predictable, recurring subscription revenue with minimal support overhead.

items.title: Position as a security advisor
items.body: Offering SSL alongside your digital services signals to SMBs that you care about their security — not just their hosting. That trust drives retention.

lifecycleFit.heading: Security That Strengthens Every Service You Sell
lifecycleFit.intro: SSL reinforces every other product in your portfolio — websites load with trust signals, stores meet PCI requirements, and email connections stay encrypted.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: SSL secures websites and hosting from the moment they launch.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: Encrypted sites benefit from better search rankings and visitor trust.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: EV and Wildcard SSL support ecommerce, multi-site environments, and scaling.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position SSL as a default attach with every website and hosting plan, a required security layer for ecommerce, and a trust-building upsell for any SMB with a public-facing site.

cta.headline: Ready to Make SSL a Default Part of Your Digital Services?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch white-label SSL certificates, bundle them across your web and ecommerce portfolio, and give your SMB customers the security they need to build trust online.
